log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Warforged — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Warforged — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Warforged — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 26 damage. Warforged — Winged Striker HP: 41/67
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Warforged — Winged Striker HP: 30/67
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
